\tzpentry{ID5906}{Energy Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5906 introduces Energy Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\rho_{\text{energy}} \propto \frac{1}{(r - r_c)^4}$$
